zh.lifeSummary: 當Otton III de Trazegnies於1198年出生在比利時海瑙特特拉聶斯時，他的父親Gilles II de Trazegnies26歲，母親Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE26歲。他於1222年與Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"在比利時海瑙特特拉聶斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1241年8月12日享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otton III de Trazegnies于1198年出生在比利时海瑙特特拉聶斯时，他的父亲Gilles II de Trazegnies26岁，母亲Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE26岁。他于1222年与Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"在比利时海瑙特特拉聶斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1241年8月12日享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Otton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Otton III de Trazegnies was born in 1198, in Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Gilles II de Trazegnies, was 26 and his mother, Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE, was 26. He married Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" in 1222, in Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 August 1241, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otton III de Trazegnies est né en 1198, à Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Gilles II de Trazegnies, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" en 1222, à Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1241, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otton III de Trazegnies 1198 in Trazegnies, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilles II de Trazegnies 26 und seine Mutter Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE 26. Er hat 1222 in Trazegnies, Hennegau, Belgien Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1241 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otton III de Trazegnies è nato il nel 1198 nel Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Gilles II de Trazegnies, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" nel 1222, nel Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1241, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otton III de Trazegniesが1198年にベルギーヘイナトトラズエグニーズで生まれた時，父Gilles II de Trazegniesは26歳，母Aleidis, Alice de BOELAEREは26歳であった。1222年にベルギーヘイナトトラズエグニーズでAgnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1241年8月12日に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otton III de Trazegnies(이)가 1198년 벨기에 하인오트 트라즈그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilles II de Trazegnies(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1222년 벨기에 하인오트 트라즈그니스에서 Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 8월 12일 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otton III de Trazegnies nasceu em 1198, em Trazegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Gilles II de Trazegnies, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" em 1222, em Trazegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1241, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otton III de Trazegnies родился в 1198 г. в местности тразегниесь, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Gilles II de Trazegnies было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" в 1222 г. в местности тразегниесь, ханаут, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1241 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otton III de Trazegnies nació en 1198, en Trazegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Gilles II de Trazegnies, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Aleidis, Alice de BOELAERE, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" en 1222, en Trazegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1241, a la edad de 43 años.
